summary: Tested 7 improvements/fixes. Fixed critical bug in FormsPage.js (missing lucide-react imports). Added missing translations for dashboard widget. All backend tests pass (9/9). Frontend features verified working.

form_designer_page.notes: Fixed missing imports (AlertTriangle, AlertCircle, Upload, Signature, Building2, SlidersHorizontal, List). Page now loads correctly with error handling.

dashboard_form_submissions_widget.notes: Widget displays correctly. Added missing translations (recentFormSubmissions, noFormSubmissions) to LanguageContext.js for both English and Dutch.

user_management_tabs.notes: Users and Permissions tabs working correctly. Permissions matrix loads without errors.

feedback_clickable_cards.notes: Feedback cards are clickable on desktop. Detail drawer opens correctly when clicking on feedback items.

ai_usage_logging.notes: AI routes have log_ai_usage() calls. Backend test confirms AI endpoints return proper responses.

form_api_error_handling.notes: Form templates and submissions APIs return proper responses. Error states implemented in FormsPage.js.

ai_causal_intelligence_error_handling.notes: AI generate-causes endpoint returns proper 404 for non-existent threats instead of 500.

critical_code_review_comments: FormsPage.js was missing critical lucide-react imports (AlertTriangle, AlertCircle, Upload, Signature, Building2, SlidersHorizontal, List) causing runtime error in production
LanguageContext.js was missing translations for new dashboard widget (recentFormSubmissions, noFormSubmissions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 improvements have been tested and verified. Fixed 2 bugs during testing: 1) Missing lucide-react imports in FormsPage.js, 2) Missing translations in LanguageContext.js. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_improvements.py.

fixes_applied.issue: Missing lucide-react imports causing 'AlertTriangle is not defined' runtime error
fixes_applied.fix: Added imports for AlertTriangle, AlertCircle, Upload, Signature, Building2, SlidersHorizontal, List

fixes_applied.issue: Missing translations for dashboard form submissions widget
fixes_applied.fix: Added recentFormSubmissions and noFormSubmissions translations for both English and Dutch
